functions.body:
local p="${1:-}"
local missing=0
local -a required=( "buildpayload_${p}" "call_api_${p}" )
local -a optional=( "call_api_streaming_${p}" "refresh_models_${p}" "validate_model_${p}" "auto_select_model_${p}" )
local f=""
for f in "${required[@]}"; do
  if ! type "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    log_error "PROVIDER" "Provider '$p' module does not define required function $f()."
    missing=1
  fi
done
for f in "${optional[@]}"; do
  if ! type "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      log_info "PROVIDER" "Provider '$p' missing optional function $f()"
    fi
  fi
done
return $missing

local fn="${1:-}"
local -a shift_args=("${@:2}")
if type "$fn" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  "$fn" "${shift_args[@]}"
  return $?
fi
return 127

local key="${1:-}"
local fn="validate_key_${PROVIDER}"
if type "$fn" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  "$fn" "$key"
  return $?
fi
return 127

local destfile="${1:-${MODELS_FILE:-$BASH4LLM_MODELS_DIR/models.txt}}"
local fn="refresh_models_${PROVIDER}"
local rc=0
if ! type "$fn" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  log_error "MODELREFRESH" "Provider '$PROVIDER' does not implement $fn()."
  return 127
fi
if "$fn" "$destfile" 2>/dev/null; then
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    log_info "MODELREFRESH" "Models refreshed for provider $PROVIDER -> $destfile"
  fi
  return 0
fi
rc=$?
if "$fn" 2>/dev/null; then
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    log_info "MODELREFRESH" "Models refreshed for provider $PROVIDER (no explicit dest)"
  fi
  return 0
fi
rc=$?
log_error "MODELREFRESH" "refresh_models for provider $PROVIDER failed (rc $rc)."
return "$rc"

local model="${1:-}"
local fn="validate_model_${PROVIDER}"
if type "$fn" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  "$fn" "$model"
  return $?
fi
if [ -z "${VALIDATE_MODEL_DISPATCH_WARNED:-}" ]; then
  log_warn "MODEL" "provider '${PROVIDER}' does not implement ${fn}; falling back to permissive validation."
  VALIDATE_MODEL_DISPATCH_WARNED=1
fi
return 0

local fn="auto_select_model_${PROVIDER}"
if type "$fn" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  "$fn"
  return $?
fi
return 127

local active_provider="" candidate="" norm="" MODEL_PROVIDER_CFG="" cfg_model="" cnt=0 m=""
ALLOWED_MODELS="${ALLOWED_MODELS:-}"
if [ -n "${MODEL:-}" ] && [ "${MODEL_CLI_SET:-0}" -ne 1 ] && [ "${CHAT_MODE:-0}" -ne 1 ]; then
  MODEL_PROVIDER_CFG="$(canonical_model_file "${PROVIDER:-groq}")"
  if [ ! -s "$MODEL_PROVIDER_CFG" ]; then
    log_warn "MODEL" "MODEL is set in environment but not passed with -m/--set-default; use -m for per-run override or --set-default to persist."
  fi
fi
FINAL_MODEL=""
if [ "${MODEL_CLI_SET:-0}" -eq 1 ] && [ -n "${MODEL:-}" ]; then
  FINAL_MODEL="$MODEL"
  return 0
fi
if [ -n "${PROVIDER_CLI:-}" ] && [ "$PROVIDER_CLI" != "list" ]; then
  active_provider="${PROVIDER_CLI}"
elif [ -f "$(canonical_provider_file)" ] && [ -s "$(canonical_provider_file)" ]; then
  active_provider="$(sed -n '1p' "$(canonical_provider_file)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  active_provider="$(printf '%s' "$active_provider" | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
  [ -z "$active_provider" ] && active_provider="${PROVIDER:-groq}"
else
  active_provider="${PROVIDER:-groq}"
fi
MODEL_PROVIDER_CFG="$(canonical_model_file "${active_provider}")"
if [ -z "$(canonical_config_dir)" ] || [ "$(canonical_config_dir)" = "/" ]; then
  log_error "SEC" "refusing to read provider-specific model file: invalid canonical config dir: $(canonical_config_dir)"
else
  if [ -s "$MODEL_PROVIDER_CFG" ]; then
    candidate="$(sed -n '1p' "$MODEL_PROVIDER_CFG" 2>/dev/null || true)"
    candidate="$(printf '%s' "$candidate" | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
    norm="$(_normalize_model_name "$candidate")"
    if [ -n "$norm" ] && is_supported_model "$norm"; then
      if validate_model_core "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1 && validate_model_dispatch "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        FINAL_MODEL="$norm"
        return 0
      fi
    fi
  fi
fi
candidate="$(auto_select_model_dispatch 2>/dev/null || true)"
if [ -n "$candidate" ]; then
  norm="$(_normalize_model_name "$candidate")"
  if is_supported_model "$norm"; then
    if validate_model_core "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1 && validate_model_dispatch "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      FINAL_MODEL="$norm"
      return 0
    fi
  fi
fi
if [ -f "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ] && [ -s "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ]; then
  cnt=0
  while IFS= read -r m || [ -n "$m" ]; do
    [ -z "$m" ] && continue
    cnt=$((cnt+1))
    norm="$(_normalize_model_name "$m")"
    if is_supported_model "$norm"; then
      if validate_model_core "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1 && validate_model_dispatch "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        FINAL_MODEL="$norm"
        return 0
      fi
    fi
    [ "$cnt" -ge "$MAX_MODELS" ] && break
  done < "$MODELS_FILE"
fi
if [ -f "${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}/config" ]; then
  cfg_model="$(awk -F= '/^MODEL=/ {sub(/^MODEL=/,""); print; exit}' "${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}/config" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  cfg_model="$(printf '%s' "$cfg_model" | awk '{$1=$1;print}')"
  norm="$(_normalize_model_name "$cfg_model")"
  if [ -n "$norm" ] && is_supported_model "$norm"; then
    if validate_model_core "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1 && validate_model_dispatch "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      FINAL_MODEL="$norm"
      return 0
    fi
  fi
fi
if [ -n "${ALLOWED_MODELS:-}" ]; then
  cnt=0
  while IFS= read -r m || [ -n "$m" ]; do
    [ -z "$m" ] && continue
    cnt=$((cnt+1))
    norm="$(_normalize_model_name "$m")"
    if is_supported_model "$norm"; then
      if validate_model_core "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1 && validate_model_dispatch "$norm" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        FINAL_MODEL="$norm"
        return 0
      fi
    fi
    [ "$cnt" -ge "$MAX_MODELS" ] && break
  done <<EOF
$(printf '%s\n' "$ALLOWED_MODELS")
EOF
fi
FINAL_MODEL=""
return 1

ensure_run_tmpdir
local fn="buildpayload_${PROVIDER}"
local rc=""
if call_provider "$fn"; then
  return 0
else
  rc=$?
  if [ "$rc" -eq 127 ]; then
    log_error "PROVIDER" "Provider '$PROVIDER' does not provide $fn()."
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
  else
    return "$rc"
  fi
fi

local fn="call_api_${PROVIDER}"
local rc=""
if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    show_payload_head "$PAYLOAD" 200 || true
    log_info "DRYRUN" "DRY-RUN: skipping provider HTTP call"
  fi
  return 0
fi
if call_provider "$fn"; then
  return 0
else
  rc=$?
  if [ "$rc" -eq 127 ]; then
    log_error "PROVIDER" "Provider '$PROVIDER' does not provide $fn()."
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
  else
    return "$rc"
  fi
fi

acquire_thread_lock || return $?
local fn="call_api_streaming_${PROVIDER}"
local rc=""
if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
    show_payload_head "$PAYLOAD" 200 || true
    log_info "DRYRUN" "DRY-RUN: skipping provider streaming HTTP call"
  fi
  release_thread_lock
  return 0
fi
trap 'printf "\n[Streaming request interrupted by user]\n" >&2; exit 130' INT
call_provider "$fn"
rc=$?
trap - INT
release_thread_lock
return "$rc"

if [ ! -s "${RESP:-}" ]; then return 0; fi
if jq -e . "$RESP" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  jq -r '
    ( [ .error?.message // empty ] 
      + [ .choices[]? | (.message?.content // .delta?.content // empty) ] )
    | map(select(length > 0))
    | .[0] // empty
  ' "$RESP" 2>/dev/null | head -n1 || true
else
  awk 'NF{print; exit}' "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || true
fi

local resp="${RESP:-}"
local tmp_copy="" content="" finish_reason="" completion_tokens=0 req_id=""
BASH4LLM_EDGE_EMPTY=0
BASH4LLM_EDGE_REQ_ID=""
BASH4LLM_EDGE_FINISH_REASON=""
BASH4LLM_EDGE_COMPLETION_TOKENS=0
tmp_copy="$(_tmpf file "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR}" resp_copy 2>/dev/null)" || return 1
cp -f "$resp" "$tmp_copy" 2>/dev/null || return 1
resp="$tmp_copy"
if [ -z "${resp:-}" ] || [ ! -s "$resp" ]; then
  BASH4LLM_EDGE_EMPTY=1
  return 0
fi
if ! is_valid_json_file "$resp"; then
  BASH4LLM_EDGE_EMPTY=1
  return 0
fi
if jq -e 'has("diagnostic") and .diagnostic==true' "$resp" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  BASH4LLM_EDGE_EMPTY=1
  return 0
fi
content="$(jq -r '.choices[0]?.message?.content // .choices[0]?.delta?.content // ""' "$resp" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
finish_reason="$(jq -r '.choices[0]?.finish_reason // ""' "$resp" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
completion_tokens="$(jq -r '.usage?.completion_tokens // 0' "$resp" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
req_id="$(jq -r '.x_groq?.id // .id // empty' "$resp" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
BASH4LLM_EDGE_REQ_ID="${req_id:-}"
BASH4LLM_EDGE_FINISH_REASON="${finish_reason:-}"
BASH4LLM_EDGE_COMPLETION_TOKENS="${completion_tokens:-0}"
if [ -z "$content" ] && [ "$finish_reason" = "stop" ] && [ "${completion_tokens:-0}" -ne 0 ] && [ "${completion_tokens:-0}" -le 1 ]; then
  BASH4LLM_EDGE_EMPTY=1
else
  BASH4LLM_EDGE_EMPTY=0
fi
return 0

local mode="${1:-}" text="${2:-}"
local resp_file="" tmp_copy="" len=0 do_save=0 dest_dir="" dest_path="" tmp_save=""
resp_file="${RESP:-}"
if [ -n "$resp_file" ]; then
  tmp_copy="$(_tmpf file "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$BASH4LLM_TMPDIR}" resp_copy 2>/dev/null)" || return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  cp -f "$resp_file" "$tmp_copy" 2>/dev/null || return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  resp_file="$tmp_copy"
fi
if { [ "$mode" = "json" ] || [ "$mode" = "pretty" ]; } && [ ! -s "$resp_file" ]; then
  log_error "RESP" "response file missing or empty: ${RESP:-<unset>}"
  return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
case "$mode" in
  json) cat "$resp_file" ;;
  pretty) if jq -e . "$resp_file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq . "$resp_file"; else cat "$resp_file"; fi ;;
  raw) printf '%s' "$text" ;;
  text) printf '%s\n' "$text" ;;
  *) printf '%s\n' "$text" ;;
esac
if [ "$mode" = "text" ] || [ "$mode" = "raw" ]; then
  if [ "${FORCE_SAVE_MODE:-}" = "nosave" ]; then return 0; fi
  do_save=0
  len="$(printf '%s' "$text" | wc -c | tr -d ' ')"
  if [ "${FORCE_SAVE_MODE:-}" = "save" ]; then
    do_save=1
  else
    if [ "$len" -gt "$THRESHOLD" ]; then
      do_save=1
    fi
  fi
  if [ "$do_save" -eq 1 ]; then
    if [ -n "$OUT_PATH" ]; then
      if [ -d "$OUT_PATH" ]; then
        dest_dir="$OUT_PATH"
        dest_path="$dest_dir/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)-groq-output-$$.txt"
      else
        dest_path="$OUT_PATH"
        dest_dir="$(dirname "$dest_path")"
      fi
    else
      dest_dir="$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR"
      dest_path="$dest_dir/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)-groq-output-$$.txt"
    fi
    safe_mkdir "$dest_dir" 700
    if [ -z "${RUN_TMPDIR:-}" ] || [ ! -d "$RUN_TMPDIR" ]; then
      log_error "TMP" "cannot create or access RUN_TMPDIR ($BASH4LLM_TMPDIR). Aborting."
      return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
    fi
    tmp_save="$(_tmpf file "$RUN_TMPDIR" save.tmp 2>/dev/null)" || return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
    printf '%s\n' "$text" > "$tmp_save" 2>/dev/null || { rm -f "$tmp_save" 2>/dev/null || true; return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; }
    lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" 10 -- mv -f "$tmp_save" "$dest_path" || { rm -f "$tmp_save" 2>/dev/null || true; return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; }
    chmod 600 "$dest_path" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
fi

acquire_thread_lock || return $?
local attempt=1 rc="" text="" api_err="" ui_last="" finish_reason="" req_id="" edgecase=0 now_ts="" http_code_fallback="" api_json=""
while [ "$attempt" -le "$MAX_RETRIES" ]; do
  trap 'printf "\n[Request interrupted by user]\n" >&2; exit 130' INT
  call_api_once
  rc=$?
  trap - INT
  if [ "$rc" -eq 130 ]; then
    release_thread_lock
    return 130
  fi
  if [ "$rc" -eq 0 ]; then
    if [ "${DRY_RUN:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
      if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
        log_info "DRYRUN" "DRY-RUN: request simulated successfully. Payload: $PAYLOAD"
      fi
      release_thread_lock
      return 0
    fi
    BASH4LLM_EDGE_EMPTY=0
    BASH4LLM_EDGE_REQ_ID=""
    BASH4LLM_EDGE_FINISH_REASON=""
    BASH4LLM_EDGE_COMPLETION_TOKENS=0
    text="$(extract_text_from_resp || true)"
    detect_empty_edge_case || true
    ui_last="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}/ui_state/last_api.json"
    if [ ! -f "$ui_last" ] || [ "$ui_last" -ot "${RESP:-/dev/null}" ]; then
      finish_reason="$(jq -r '.choices[0]?.finish_reason // empty' "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
      req_id="$(jq -r '.x_groq?.id // .id // empty' "$RESP" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
      edgecase=0
      if [ "${BASH4LLM_EDGE_EMPTY:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then edgecase=1; fi
      now_ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
      http_code_fallback=0
      if [ -s "$RESP" ]; then http_code_fallback=200; fi
      api_json="$(jq -c -n --argjson http "$http_code_fallback" --arg fr "${finish_reason:-}" --argjson edge "$edgecase" --arg id "${req_id:-}" --arg ts "$now_ts" '{last_http_status:$http, last_finish_reason:$fr, last_edgecase_detected:$edge, last_req_id:$id, last_time_utc:$ts}')"
      ui_state_write "last_api.json" "$api_json" || { if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to write fallback last_api.json"; fi; }
    fi
    if [ -z "$text" ] && [ "$OUTPUT_MODE" != "json" ] && [ "$OUTPUT_MODE" != "pretty" ]; then
      api_err="$(extract_api_error || true)"
      if [ -n "$api_err" ]; then
        log_error "API" "API error: $api_err"
        release_thread_lock
        return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
      else
        if [ "${BASH4LLM_EDGE_EMPTY:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          printf '%s\n' \
            "API edge case detected: empty completion" \
            "  req_id: ${BASH4LLM_EDGE_REQ_ID:-<none>}" \
            "  finish_reason: ${BASH4LLM_EDGE_FINISH_REASON:-<none>}" \
            "  completion_tokens: ${BASH4LLM_EDGE_COMPLETION_TOKENS:-0}" >&2
          log_error "API" "empty completion returned by provider (see previous diagnostic lines)."
          release_thread_lock
          return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
        fi
        log_error "API" "no textual content extracted from response."
        if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          head -n 50 "${RESP:-/dev/null}" >&2 || true
        fi
        release_thread_lock
        return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
      fi
    fi
    finalize_and_output "$OUTPUT_MODE" "$text"
    release_thread_lock
    return 0
  else
    if [ "$rc" -eq "$BASH4LLM_ERR_CURL_FAILED" ]; then
      printf 'bash4llm: %sWARN%s: Network error (curl). Retrying...\n' "${C_BYELLOW}" "${C_RST}" >&2
    elif [ "$rc" -eq "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API" ]; then
      printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: HTTP/API error. Not retrying.\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" >&2
      if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
        head -n 50 "${RESP:-/dev/null}" >&2 || true
      fi
      release_thread_lock
      return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"
    else
      printf 'bash4llm: %sWARN%s: Unknown error (code %s). Retrying...\n' "${C_BYELLOW}" "${C_RST}" "$rc" >&2
    fi
  fi
  attempt=$((attempt + 1)); sleep $((attempt * 1))
done
log_error "REQUEST" "request failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts."
release_thread_lock
return "$BASH4LLM_ERR_API"

local out="" first=1 f
for f in "$@"; do
  if file_readable "$f"; then
    [ "$first" -eq 0 ] && out="${out}"$'\n\n'"--- FILE: ${a} ---"$'\n\n'
    out="${out}$(cat "$f")"; first=0
  else log_error "FILE" "file not readable: $f"; exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; fi
done
printf '%s' "$out"

local out="" first=1 a
for a in ${ARGS[@]+"${ARGS[@]}"}; do
  if file_readable "$a"; then
    [ "$first" -eq 0 ] && out="${out}"$'\n\n'"--- FILE: ${a} ---"$'\n\n'
    out="${out}$(cat "$a")"; first=0
  else
    [ "$first" -eq 0 ] && out="${out}"$'\n\n'
    out="${out}${a}"; first=0
  fi
done
printf '%s' "$out"
printf '%s' "$1" | awk '{$1=$1; print}'
printf '%s\n' "$1" | awk 'BEGIN{exit 0} {exit !( $0+0 == $0+0 )}'

if [ ! -s "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ]; then
  printf 'No models available locally. Consider --refresh-models.\n' >&2
  return 1
fi
local count=0 model="" norm=""
while IFS= read -r model || [ -n "$model" ]; do
  [ -z "$model" ] && continue
  count=$((count+1))
  norm="$(_normalize_model_name "$model")"
  if is_supported_model "$norm"; then
    printf '%s\n' "$norm"
  else
    printf '%s\t[%sNOT SUPPORTED%s: Requires non-text input]\n' "$norm" "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}"
  fi
  if [ "$count" -ge "$MAX_MODELS" ]; then break; fi
done < "$MODELS_FILE"
return 0

local model="${1:-}" norm_model="" file_match=0
[ -n "$model" ] || { printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: validate_model_core: model required\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" >&2; return 1; }
norm_model="$(_normalize_model_name "$model")"
if [ -f "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ] && [ -s "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ]; then
  if grep -x -F -q "$model" "$MODELS_FILE" 2>/dev/null; then
    file_match=1
  else
    file_match=0
    while IFS= read -r m || [ -n "$m" ]; do
      [ -z "$m" ] && continue
      if [ "$(_normalize_model_name "$m")" = "$norm_model" ]; then
        file_match=1
        break
      fi
    done < "$MODELS_FILE"
  fi
  if [ "$file_match" -ne 1 ]; then
    printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: The model "%s" is not present in %s\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" "$model" "$MODELS_FILE" >&2
    return 1
  fi
fi
if ! is_supported_model "$norm_model"; then
  printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: The "%s" model is not supported by %s (requires non-text input).\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" "$model" "${C_GBOLD}Bash4LLM⁺${C_RST}" >&2
  return 1
fi
return 0

local m="" norm=""
ALLOWED_MODELS=""
if [ -f "$MODELS_FILE" ] && [ -s "$MODELS_FILE" ]; then
  while IFS= read -r m || [ -n "$m" ]; do
    [ -z "$m" ] && continue
    norm="$(_normalize_model_name "$m")"
    [ -n "$norm" ] && ALLOWED_MODELS="${ALLOWED_MODELS}${norm}"$'\n'
  done < "$MODELS_FILE"
fi

blocks.body:
while [ $# -gt 0 ]; do
  case "$1" in
    --init-thread) INIT_THREAD=1; shift ;;
    --delete-thread)
      check_required_arg "--delete-thread" "$#"
      DELETE_THREAD_ID="$2"
      DELETE_THREAD=1
      shift 2
      ;;
    --rename-thread)
      check_required_arg "--rename-thread" "$#"
      RENAME_THREAD_ID="$2"
      RENAME_THREAD=1
      shift 2
      ;;
    --title)
      check_required_arg "--title" "$#"
      RENAME_TITLE="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --refresh-models|--refresh-model) REFRESH_MODELS=1; shift ;;
    --list-models|--list-model) LIST_MODELS=1; shift ;;
    --list-providers|--list-provider) LIST_PROVIDERS=1; shift ;;
    --list-providers-raw|--list-provider-raw) LIST_PROVIDERS_RAW=1; shift ;;
    --list-models-raw|--list-model-raw) LIST_MODELS_RAW=1; shift ;;
    --set-default)
      check_required_arg "--set-default" "$#"
      SET_DEFAULT_MODEL="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -m|--model)
      check_required_arg "--model" "$#"
      MODEL="$2"
      MODEL_CLI_SET=1
      shift 2
      ;;
    -f)
      check_required_arg "-f" "$#"
      FILE_INPUTS+=("$2")
      shift 2
      ;;
    --json-input)
      check_required_arg "--json-input" "$#"
      JSON_INPUT="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --template)
      check_required_arg "--template" "$#"
      TEMPLATE="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --batch)
      check_required_arg "--batch" "$#"
      BATCH_FILE="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --thread)
      check_required_arg "--thread" "$#"
      THREAD_ID="$2"
      if [ "${THREAD_ID:0:1}" = "-" ]; then
        log_error "ARGS" "--thread requires a valid thread ID argument"
        exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
      fi
      shift 2
      ;;
    --thread-window)
      if [ "$#" -ge 2 ] && [ -n "${2:-}" ] && [ "${2:0:1}" != "-" ]; then
        THREAD_WINDOW="$2"
        shift 2
      else
        THREAD_WINDOW="10"
        shift
      fi
      ;;
    --system)
      check_required_arg "--system" "$#"
      SYSTEM_PROMPT="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --ture|--temperature)
      check_required_arg "--temperature" "$#"
      TEMPERATURE="$2"
      TURE="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --max)
      check_required_arg "--max" "$#"
      MAX_TOKENS="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --debug) DEBUG=1; shift ;;
    --save) FORCE_SAVE_MODE="save"; shift ;;
    --nosave) FORCE_SAVE_MODE="nosave"; shift ;;
    --out)
      check_required_arg "--out" "$#"
      OUT_PATH="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --threshold)
      check_required_arg "--threshold" "$#"
      THRESHOLD="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    --dry-run) DRY_RUN=1; shift ;;
    --quiet) QUIET=1; shift ;;
    --stream) STREAM_MODE=1; shift ;;
    --no-stream) STREAM_MODE=0; shift ;;
    --json) OUTPUT_MODE="json"; shift ;;
    --pretty) OUTPUT_MODE="pretty"; shift ;;
    --text) OUTPUT_MODE="text"; shift ;;
    --raw) OUTPUT_MODE="raw"; shift ;;
    --chat|--tui) CHAT_MODE=1; shift ;;
    --show-config) SHOW_CONFIG=1; shift ;;
    --diagnostics|--diagnostic) DIAGNOSTICS=1; shift ;;
    --provider|--providers)
      if [ "$#" -ge 2 ] && [ -n "${2:-}" ] && [ "${2:0:1}" != "-" ]; then
        PROVIDER_CLI="$2"
        shift 2
      else
        PROVIDER_INTERACTIVE=1
        shift
      fi
      ;;
    --install-extras|--install-extra)
      INSTALL_EXTRAS=1
      if [ $# -gt 1 ] && [ "${2:0:1}" != "-" ]; then
        INSTALL_EXTRAS_SRC="$2"
        shift
      fi
      shift
      ;;
    --install-extras=*|--install-extra=*)
      INSTALL_EXTRAS=1
      if [[ "$1" == --install-extras=* ]]; then
        INSTALL_EXTRAS_SRC="${1#--install-extras=}"
      else
        INSTALL_EXTRAS_SRC="${1#--install-extra=}"
      fi
      shift
      ;;
    --vault)
      if [ "${BASH4LLM_OPENSSL_ACTIVE:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
        ensure_run_tmpdir || exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
        vault_console
        exit 0
      else
        log_error "SECURITY" "The OpenSSL helper module is not active or openssl is missing on this platform. Vault command unavailable."
        exit 1
      fi
      ;;
    --version) printf '%s %s (%s)\n' "$SCRIPT_NAME" "$SCRIPT_VERSION" "$SCRIPT_DATE"; exit 0 ;;
    -h|--help)
      help_file="$BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR/docs/help.txt"
      if [ -f "$help_file" ]; then
        if [ -z "${C_BCYAN:-}" ]; then
          cat "$help_file"
        else
          sed \
            -e "s/^\([A-Za-z][A-Za-z[:blank:]&]*:\)/${C_BCYAN}\1${C_RST}/" \
            -e "s/\(--[a-zA-Z0-9-][a-zA-Z0-9-]*\)/${C_BGREEN}\1${C_RST}/g" \
            -e "s/\([[:blank:],]\)\(-[a-zA-Z0-9]\)/\1${C_BGREEN}\2${C_RST}/g" \
            -e "s/\(<[a-zA-Z0-9_]\{1,\}>\)/${C_YELLOW}\1${C_RST}/g" \
            -e "s/\`\([^\`]*\)\`/${C_BYELLOW}\1${C_RST}/g" \
            "$help_file"
        fi
      else
        printf 'Help file not found: %s\n' "$help_file" >&2
      fi
      exit 0 ;;
    --bootstrap-only)
      BOOTSTRAP_ONLY=1
      shift
      ;;
    --)
      shift; break ;;
    -*)
      printf 'bash4llm: %sERROR%s: Unknown option: %s\n' "${C_RED}" "${C_RST}" "$1" >&2; exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP" ;;
    *)
      ARGS+=("$1"); shift ;;
  esac
done

_engine_path="${BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR}/session/session-engine.sh"
_engine_available=0
if [ -f "$_engine_path" ] && [ "${BASH4LLM_SESSION_ENGINE:-on}" != "off" ]; then
  if bash -n "$_engine_path" 2>/dev/null; then
    . "$_engine_path"
    if type session_engine_build_window >/dev/null 2>&1 && type session_engine_append >/dev/null 2>&1 && type session_engine_enabled >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      if session_engine_enabled 2>/dev/null; then
        _engine_available=1
        if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          log_info "SESSION" "Session Engine loaded and available"
        fi
      else
        _engine_available=0
        if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
          log_info "SESSION" "Session Engine loaded but disabled by module"
        fi
      fi
    else
      _engine_available=0
      log_warn "SESSION" "Session Engine module missing required functions; falling back to legacy"
    fi
  else
    _engine_available=0
    log_warn "SESSION" "Session Engine module has syntax errors; falling back to legacy"
  fi
else
  _engine_available=0
fi

: "${ALLOW_API_CALLS:=1}"
if [ -n "${GROQ_API_KEY:-}" ] && ! is_truthy "${ALLOW_API_CALLS:-0}" && ! is_truthy "${DRY_RUN:-0}"; then
  log_error "APIKEY" "GROQ_API_KEY is set but ALLOW_API_CALLS!=1 and DRY_RUN!=1."
  exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
fi
_supported_providers_arr=()
_supported_providers_arr+=("groq")
extras_prov_dir="${PROVIDERS_DIR:-${BASH4LLM_EXTRAS_DIR}/providers}"
if [ -z "${extras_prov_dir:-}" ]; then
  extras_prov_dir="$(canonical_config_dir)/providers"
fi
if [ -d "$extras_prov_dir" ]; then
  for pf in "$extras_prov_dir"/*.sh; do
    [ -e "$pf" ] || continue
    base="$(basename "$pf" .sh)"
    [ "$base" = "groq" ] && continue
    _supported_providers_arr+=("$base")
  done
fi
SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS="$(printf '%s ' "${_supported_providers_arr[@]}" | sed 's/ $//')"
export SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS

if [ "${LIST_PROVIDERS_RAW:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ "${#_supported_providers_arr[@]}" -eq 0 ]; then
    exit 1
  fi
  for p in ${_supported_providers_arr[@]+"${_supported_providers_arr[@]}"}; do
    printf '%s\n' "$p"
  done
  exit 0
fi
if [ "${LIST_MODELS_RAW:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ -n "${PROVIDER_CLI:-}" ]; then
    PROVIDER="${PROVIDER_CLI}"
  fi
  if [ -f "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ] && [ -s "${MODELS_FILE:-}" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r m || [ -n "$m" ]; do
      [ -z "$m" ] && continue
      norm="$(_normalize_model_name "$m")"
      [ -n "$norm" ] && printf '%s\n' "$norm"
    done < "$MODELS_FILE"
    exit 0
  else
    exit 2
  fi
fi

if [ "${DELETE_THREAD:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ -z "${DELETE_THREAD_ID:-}" ]; then
    log_error "THREAD" "--delete-thread requires a valid thread ID"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  thread_delete_core "$DELETE_THREAD_ID"
  exit 0
fi
if [ "${RENAME_THREAD:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ -z "${RENAME_THREAD_ID:-}" ]; then
    log_error "THREAD" "--rename-thread requires a valid thread ID"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  thread_rename_core "$RENAME_THREAD_ID" "${RENAME_TITLE:-}"
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$LIST_PROVIDERS" -eq 1 ]; then
  printf 'Available providers:\n' >&2
  printf '  - groq (embedded)\n' >&2
  extras_prov_dir="$PROVIDERS_DIR"
  if [ -d "$extras_prov_dir" ]; then
    for f in "$extras_prov_dir"/*.sh; do
      [ -e "$f" ] || continue
      base="$(basename "$f" .sh)"
      [ "$base" = "groq" ] && continue
      printf '  - %s\n' "$base" >&2
    done
  fi
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$LIST_MODELS" -eq 1 ]; then
  if list_models_cli; then exit 0; else exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"; fi
fi
if [ -n "$SET_DEFAULT_MODEL" ]; then
  safe_mkdir "$(canonical_config_dir)" 700
  target_provider="${PROVIDER:-groq}"
  target_model_file="$(canonical_model_file "${target_provider}")"
  if ! printf '%s\n' "$SET_DEFAULT_MODEL" | atomic_write "$target_model_file" 10; then
    log_error "MODEL" "cannot persist default model to $target_model_file"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  chmod 600 "$target_model_file" 2>/dev/null || true
  log_info_user "MODEL" "default model for $target_provider set to: $SET_DEFAULT_MODEL"
  exit 0
fi
if [ "$INSTALL_EXTRAS" -eq 1 ] || [ "${INSTALL_EXTRAS:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  SRC_DIR="${INSTALL_EXTRAS_SRC:-$LEGACY_EXTRAS_DIR}"
  DEST_DIR="${CANONICAL_EXTRAS_DIR}"
  SRC_BASE=""
  DEST_BASE=""
  if [ -d "$SRC_DIR" ]; then
    SRC_BASE="$(cd "$SRC_DIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && pwd || true)"
  fi
  safe_mkdir "$(dirname "$DEST_DIR")" 700
  if [ -d "$DEST_DIR" ]; then
    DEST_BASE="$(cd "$DEST_DIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 && pwd || true)"
  else
    PARENT_DEST="$(cd "$(dirname "$DEST_DIR")" >/dev/null 2>&1 && pwd || true)"
    if [ -n "$PARENT_DEST" ]; then
      DEST_BASE="${PARENT_DEST%/}/extras"
    fi
  fi
  if [ -z "$SRC_BASE" ] || [ ! -d "$SRC_BASE" ]; then
    log_error "EXTRAS" "Source directory does not exist or is invalid: ${SRC_DIR}"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  if [ "$SRC_BASE" = "$DEST_BASE" ]; then
    log_error "EXTRAS" "Install source and destination cannot match: ${SRC_BASE}"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  log_info_user "EXTRAS" "Synchronizing extras from ${SRC_BASE} to ${DEST_BASE}..."
  safe_mkdir "$DEST_BASE" 700
  if cp -R "$SRC_BASE/." "$DEST_BASE/" 2>/dev/null; then
    find "$DEST_BASE" -type d -exec chmod 700 {} + 2>/dev/null || true
    find "$DEST_BASE" -type f -exec chmod 600 {} + 2>/dev/null || true
    log_info_user "EXTRAS" "Installation successfully completed."
  else
    log_error "EXTRAS" "Error copying extras files."
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  exit 0
fi
if [ "${INIT_THREAD:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then
  if [ -z "${THREAD_ID:-}" ]; then
    log_error "THREAD" "--init-thread requires a valid thread ID via --thread"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  if ! thread_validate_id "$THREAD_ID"; then
    log_error "THREAD" "invalid thread id: $THREAD_ID"
    exit "$BASH4LLM_ERR_TMP"
  fi
  safe_mkdir "$BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR/threads" 700
  thread_file="${BASH4LLM_HISTORY_DIR}/threads/${THREAD_ID}.ndjson"
  if [ ! -f "$thread_file" ]; then
    : > "$thread_file"
    chmod 600 "$thread_file"
  fi
  meta_file="${BASH4LLM_CONFIG_DIR%/}/ui_state/threads/${THREAD_ID}.json"
  meta_json="$(jq -c -n --arg id "$THREAD_ID" --arg title "Thread ${THREAD_ID:0:8}" \
    '{id:$id, active:true, msg_count:0, last_ts:"", title:$title}')"
  ui_state_write "threads/${THREAD_ID}.json" "$meta_json"
  lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" 10 -- _update_thread_index "$THREAD_ID"
  log_info_user "THREAD" "Thread initialized: $THREAD_ID"
  exit 0
fi

for flag in DRY_RUN STREAM_MODE INSTALL_EXTRAS PROVIDER_INTERACTIVE LIST_MODELS LIST_PROVIDERS CHAT_MODE QUIET SHOW_CONFIG DIAGNOSTICS; do
  if is_truthy "${!flag:-0}"; then printf -v "$flag" 1; else printf -v "$flag" 0; fi
done
